data.content: Added regression contract assertions in history-beat-id-copy-contract to enforce stripped beat-id rendering across list/header/detail/log copy controls; validated via bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, NODE_ENV=production bun run build; shipped on origin/main at 7624f4b0b57083b528441c9e3b247097fce2ad5a.
